problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
